testcase.name: Root_Still_Returns_200_After_Other_Calls
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Root still returns 200 after other calls given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001993s when I GET "/" ... Status.passed in 0.005951s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.198e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Second_Root_Check
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Second root check given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001271s when I GET "/" ... Status.passed in 0.001044s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.506e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Items_Endpoint_Returns_200_With_Empty_List_After_Reset
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Items endpoint returns 200 with empty list after reset given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001142s when I GET "/items" ... Status.passed in 0.0008903s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.719e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Create_Two_Items_And_List_Them
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Create two items and list them given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.227e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0009913s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.505e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0007682s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.409e-05s when I GET "/items" ... Status.passed in 0.000653s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.195e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Get_First_Item_By_Id
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Get first item by id given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.488e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0007441s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.91e-05s when I GET "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.0008121s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.386e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Get_Second_Item_By_Id
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Get second item by id given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.702e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0007169s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.314e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0006862s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.29e-05s when I GET "/items/2" ... Status.passed in 0.0006561s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.195e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Login_As_Charlie
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Login as charlie given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.297e-05s when I POST to "/login" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0009859s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.6e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Login_As_Dana
testcase.system-out:

scenario: Login as dana given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.704e-05s when I POST to "/login" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.000782s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.625e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Secure_With_Invalid_Bearer_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Secure with invalid bearer returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.702e-05s when I request GET "/secure" with Authorization "Bearer invalid-token" ... Status.passed in 0.000813s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 3.314e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Admin_With_Malformed_Bearer_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Admin with malformed bearer returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.082e-05s when I request GET "/admin" with Authorization "not-bearer xyz" ... Status.passed in 0.0007927s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 3.409e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Another flaky sample given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.082e-05s when I GET "/flaky" ... Status.passed in 0.0009198s then the status code should be one of 200, 500 ... Status.passed in 4.125e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Another_Chaos_Sample
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Another chaos sample given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.918e-05s when I GET "/chaos" ... Status.passed in 0.0008759s then the status code should be one of 200, 401, 500 ... Status.passed in 3.6e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Delete_Missing_Item_Returns_404
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Delete missing item returns 404 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.584e-05s when I DELETE "/items/999" ... Status.passed in 0.0009139s then the status code should be 404 ... Status.passed in 3.386e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Get_Missing_Item_Returns_404
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Get missing item returns 404 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.321e-05s when I GET "/items/999" ... Status.passed in 0.0006721s then the status code should be 404 ... Status.passed in 3.099e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Login_Default_Username_Path
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Login default username path given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.012e-05s when I POST to "/login" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001012s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.529e-05s then the JSON field "token" should exist ... Status.passed in 3.6e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
